title: Agent Behavior Tools Library v1
description: Schema for the shared library of tool definitions that agent-behavior scenarios can reference by name. Consumed by execution-based rubrics (spec §15, S8-ABV-EXT-3). Each entry maps to an Anthropic API tool-schema passed in the `tools` field of `/v1/messages`. When a scenario declares `tools: [Grep, Read, Glob]`, the harness resolves each name to an entry in the library YAML before dispatching the agent call. Keeping the library shared means scenarios don't re-declare tool schemas and updates (e.g., adding a new parameter to Grep) happen in one place.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this library.

tools.description: Map from tool name (as referenced by scenarios) to tool schema. Tool names are the exact strings scenarios put in their `tools: [...]` list.

description.description: Human-readable tool description as Anthropic's API expects it. Used by the model to decide when to call the tool.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input arguments. Passed verbatim to the Anthropic API as the tool's `input_schema`. Shape matches Anthropic's tool-use contract.

notes.description: Optional notes about the tool — e.g., why the schema looks the way it does, known quirks.
